description:
REQ-030 Phase 1, item 1: reconcile_stale_in_progress_tasks_for_project() in daemon_reconciliation.rs has a hardcoded 10-minute threshold (line ~231) for resetting stuck InProgress tasks to Ready. This ignores the user-configurable stale_threshold_hours (default 24h) from DaemonRunArgs.

Changes needed:
1. In reconcile_stale_in_progress_tasks_for_project(), replace the hardcoded `Duration::from_secs(600)` with the `stale_threshold_hours` value from DaemonRunArgs (convert hours to Duration)
2. Pass stale_threshold_hours into the reconciliation function from the tick context
3. Add test: task older than threshold gets reset, task younger than threshold is left alone
4. Consider adding a separate shorter threshold for "no workflow found" resets vs "has workflow but stale" cases

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_reconciliation.rs (line ~231)
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_scheduler_project_tick.rs (passes args)
title: Fix stale reconciliation to use configurable threshold instead of hardcoded 10min
